title: turpethum australe
intro: Turpethum australe, also known as Turpetha, is a plant species native to India, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Turpethum australe include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Turpethum australe can be prepared into various herbal forms, including powder, decoction, and oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
